high_value_missed_followups: Fallback protocol for current workaround failure (e.g., device loss, data corruption, or system outage)
Concrete consequence or near-miss from the deferred reconciliation strategy
Direct driver prioritization when efficiency, cognitive load, and trust/conflict avoidance are all present
likely_misclassified_driver_patterns: Collapsing 'operational rhythm maintenance' as the sole driver without testing its hierarchy against 'trust preservation' or 'cognitive load reduction'
evidence_handling_issues: Accepting self-described coping mechanisms as stable habits without verifying their failure modes or escalation paths
Allowing synthesis outputs to cross into speculative product design before concept introduction and testing
blocked_feedback: Probing why the participant views real-time tracking as a 'chore' rather than a necessary control step (too tied to this specific cognitive load claim)
Assessing the reliability of using a legacy iOS notes app for financial tracking (tool-specific)
Exploring the exact threshold where 'patching later' becomes unacceptable due to external stakeholder pressure (context-specific to tutoring center operations)
